# Manual loading works while automatic loading is disabled.
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL slow 0s
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport
exec mina serve --config-file exchange-rate-loading.toml --db $WORK/rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'

httpget -method POST -status 201 -body account_eur.json http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/accounts
stdout '"account_id":1'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body account_counterparty.json http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/accounts
stdout '"account_id":2'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body category.json http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/categories
stdout '"category_id":3'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body transaction.json http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/transactions
stdout '"transaction_id"'

httpget -method POST -status 202 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/runs
stdout '"operation_id":"exchange-rate-loading"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"last_success":true'
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'

httpget 'http://127.0.0.1:'$PORT'/exchange-rates?from_currency=USD&to_currency=EUR&effective_date=2024-04-02T00:00:00Z'
stdout '"exchange_rates":\['
stdout '"from_currency":"USD"'
stdout '"to_currency":"EUR"'
stdout '"effective_date":"2024-04-02T00:00:00Z"'

kill -INT server
wait server

# Startup cache population accepts provider quote codes outside Mina's domain currency set.
freeport PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file exchange-rate-loading.toml --db $WORK/provider-quotes.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT --quiet &provider_quote_prep_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body account_eur.json http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT/accounts
stdout '"account_id":1'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body account_counterparty.json http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT/accounts
stdout '"account_id":2'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body category.json http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT/categories
stdout '"category_id":3'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body transaction.json http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PREP_PORT/transactions
stdout '"transaction_id"'
kill -INT provider_quote_prep_server
wait provider_quote_prep_server

frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL provider-quotes 0s
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/provider-quote-cache HOME=$WORK/provider-quote-home MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport PROVIDER_QUOTE_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/provider-quotes.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PROVIDER_QUOTE_PORT --quiet &provider_quote_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
exists $WORK/provider-quote-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
httpget 'http://127.0.0.1:'$PROVIDER_QUOTE_PORT'/exchange-rates?from_currency=USD&to_currency=EUR&effective_date=2024-04-02T00:00:00Z'
stdout '"exchange_rates":\['
stdout '"from_currency":"USD"'
stdout '"to_currency":"EUR"'
stdout '"effective_date":"2024-04-02T00:00:00Z"'
kill -INT provider_quote_server
wait provider_quote_server

# Automatic startup loading runs after serve binds its listener.
mkdir $WORK/cache/mina
mkdir $WORK/home
cp frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson $WORK/cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL slow 0s
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/cache HOME=$WORK/home MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport STARTUP_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $STARTUP_PORT --quiet &startup_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$STARTUP_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$STARTUP_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
kill -INT startup_server
wait startup_server

# Automatic startup loading falls back to the platform user cache dir when XDG is unset.
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL slow 0s
env XDG_CACHE_HOME= HOME=$WORK/fallback-home LocalAppData=$WORK/fallback-local-app-data MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
[darwin] mkdir $WORK/fallback-home/Library/Caches/mina
[darwin] cp frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson $WORK/fallback-home/Library/Caches/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
[windows] mkdir $WORK/fallback-local-app-data/mina
[windows] cp frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson $WORK/fallback-local-app-data/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
[!darwin] [!windows] mkdir $WORK/fallback-home/.cache/mina
[!darwin] [!windows] cp frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson $WORK/fallback-home/.cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
freeport FALLBACK_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/fallback-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $FALLBACK_PORT --quiet &fallback_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$FALLBACK_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$FALLBACK_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
kill -INT fallback_server
wait fallback_server

# Interrupted cache population records failure, keeps safe partial rows, and later resumes.
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/partial-cache HOME=$WORK/partial-home
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL truncated 0s
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport PARTIAL_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/partial-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PARTIAL_PORT --quiet &partial_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PARTIAL_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":false' http://127.0.0.1:$PARTIAL_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
cmp partial-frankfurter-cache.ndjson $WORK/partial-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
! glob $WORK/partial-cache/mina/.frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson.*.tmp

httpget -method POST -status 201 -body account_eur.json http://127.0.0.1:$PARTIAL_PORT/accounts
stdout '"account_id":1'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body account_counterparty.json http://127.0.0.1:$PARTIAL_PORT/accounts
stdout '"account_id":2'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body category.json http://127.0.0.1:$PARTIAL_PORT/categories
stdout '"category_id":3'
httpget -method POST -status 201 -body transaction.json http://127.0.0.1:$PARTIAL_PORT/transactions
stdout '"transaction_id"'

kill -INT partial_server
wait partial_server

frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL expect-from 0s 2024-04-02
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport RESUME_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/partial-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $RESUME_PORT --quiet &resume_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$RESUME_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$RESUME_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
httpget 'http://127.0.0.1:'$RESUME_PORT'/exchange-rates?from_currency=USD&to_currency=EUR&effective_date=2024-04-02T00:00:00Z'
stdout '"exchange_rates":\['
stdout '"from_currency":"USD"'
stdout '"to_currency":"EUR"'
stdout '"effective_date":"2024-04-02T00:00:00Z"'
kill -INT resume_server
wait resume_server

# Canceled cache population keeps safe partial rows and later resumes.
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/stalled-cache HOME=$WORK/stalled-home
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL stall 0s $WORK/stalled-frankfurter-ready
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport STALLED_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/stalled-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $STALLED_PORT --quiet &stalled_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$STALLED_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
waitfile -timeout 10s $WORK/stalled-frankfurter-ready
kill -INT stalled_server
wait stalled_server
cmp partial-frankfurter-cache.ndjson $WORK/stalled-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
! glob $WORK/stalled-cache/mina/.frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson.*.tmp

frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL slow 0s
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport STALLED_RESUME_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/stalled-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $STALLED_RESUME_PORT --quiet &stalled_resume_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$STALLED_RESUME_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$STALLED_RESUME_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
cmp frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson $WORK/stalled-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
kill -INT stalled_resume_server
wait stalled_resume_server

# Cache population tolerates a slow NDJSON stream and installs a final cache file.
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/slow-cache HOME=$WORK/slow-home
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL slow 11s
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport SLOW_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/slow-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $SLOW_PORT --quiet &slow_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$SLOW_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 30s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$SLOW_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
exists $WORK/slow-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
! glob $WORK/slow-cache/mina/.frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson.*.tmp
kill -INT slow_server
wait slow_server

# Cache population preserves a cache that appears while population is streaming.
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/competing-cache HOME=$WORK/competing-home
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL competing-install 0s $WORK/competing-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport COMPETING_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/competing-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $COMPETING_PORT --quiet &competing_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$COMPETING_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$COMPETING_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
cmp competing-frankfurter-cache.ndjson $WORK/competing-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
kill -INT competing_server
wait competing_server

# Cache extension preserves a newer cache installed while resume streaming.
env XDG_CACHE_HOME=$WORK/competing-resume-cache HOME=$WORK/competing-resume-home
mkdir $WORK/competing-resume-cache/mina
cp partial-frankfurter-cache.ndjson $WORK/competing-resume-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
frankfurter FRANKFURTER_URL competing-install 0s $WORK/competing-resume-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
env MINA_FX_FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL=$FRANKFURTER_URL
freeport COMPETING_RESUME_PORT
exec mina serve --config-file automatic-startup-loading.toml --db $WORK/competing-resume-startup-rates.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $COMPETING_RESUME_PORT --quiet &competing_resume_server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$COMPETING_RESUME_PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpwait -timeout 10s '"last_success":true' http://127.0.0.1:$COMPETING_RESUME_PORT/background-operations/exchange-rate-loading/status
stdout '"completed_run_revision":1'
cmp competing-frankfurter-cache.ndjson $WORK/competing-resume-cache/mina/frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson
kill -INT competing_resume_server
wait competing_resume_server

-- account_eur.json --
{"fqn":"checking:EUR","currency":"EUR"}

-- account_counterparty.json --
{"fqn":"counterparty:EUR"}

-- category.json --
{"fqn":"Transfers:EUR"}

-- transaction.json --
{
  "initiated_date": "2024-04-02",
  "records": [
    {
      "account_id": 1,
      "amount": "-10.00000000",
      "amount_usd": null,
      "category_id": 3,
      "currency": "EUR",
      "pending_date": "2024-04-02T12:00:00Z",
      "posted_date": "2024-04-02T12:00:00Z",
      "posting_status": "posted",
      "reconciliation_status": "reconciled",
      "source": "manual"
    },
    {
      "account_id": 2,
      "amount": "10.00000000",
      "amount_usd": null,
      "category_id": 3,
      "currency": "EUR",
      "pending_date": "2024-04-02T12:00:00Z",
      "posted_date": "2024-04-02T12:00:00Z",
      "posting_status": "posted",
      "reconciliation_status": "reconciled",
      "source": "manual"
    }
  ]
}

-- exchange-rate-loading.toml --
[exchange_rates]
automatic_loading_enabled = false

-- startup-loading.toml --
[exchange_rates]
automatic_loading_enabled = true

[exchange_rates.frankfurter]
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:1"

-- automatic-startup-loading.toml --
[exchange_rates]
automatic_loading_enabled = true

-- frankfurter-usd-rates.ndjson --
{"date":"2024-04-02","base":"USD","quote":"EUR","rate":0.93000000}
{"date":"2026-04-01","base":"USD","quote":"EUR","rate":1.09000000}
-- competing-frankfurter-cache.ndjson --
{"date":"2024-04-02","base":"USD","quote":"EUR","rate":1.23000000}
{"date":"2026-04-01","base":"USD","quote":"EUR","rate":1.45000000}
-- partial-frankfurter-cache.ndjson --
{"date":"2024-04-02","base":"USD","quote":"EUR","rate":0.93000000}
